title: Advertises a machine-readable output mode
rationale: Agents and scripts need stable, parseable output. A --json or --format mode (and a --plain mode for tables) lets them consume results without scraping human text.
remediation: Offer --json (or --format json) for structured output, and keep it stable across releases.

title: Advertises a non-interactive mode
rationale: Unattended callers cannot answer prompts. A flag such as --no-input, --yes, or --non-interactive lets a CLI run without a human.
remediation: Provide a way to skip prompts (e.g. --no-input or --yes) and never require interactive input.
